modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble filtering data by Label Filters in Excel

full_description_text: 
Hola, I’m trying to use Label Filters in Excel but it’s not working right. I thought I could just click and filter, but nothing happens. It’s really confusing and I’m not sure what to do next. Can someone help me with this?
short_description: Trouble filtering data by Label Filters in Excel
description: Hola, I’m trying to use Label Filters in Excel but it’s not working right. I thought I could just click and filter, but nothing happens. It’s really confusing and I’m not sure what to do next. Can someone help me with this?
